message:
test(fcp-conformance/capability-resource): pin resource-constraint enforcement (br-cngar)

CapabilityVerifier::verify_unbound enforces a CapabilityConstraints
allow/deny matching policy that is the bearer-token replay defense:
without it a leaked token would be usable against any resource. The
existing capability conformance tests cover nbf/exp/cap-id/operation
but NOT the resource-scope path. Adds 10 tests pinning:

- wildcard_allow_accepts_arbitrary_uri ('*' = unrestricted)
- wildcard_allow_accepts_empty_resource_uris_slice (the documented
  exemption that lets the ~76 verifier.verify(.., &[]) call sites
  continue to work)
- empty_constraints_set_denies_all_per_c3_4_default_deny (NORMATIVE
  C3.4: empty allow + empty deny = DENY ALL; pins the
  CapabilityDenied reason string so triage tooling can detect the
  default-deny path)
- non_wildcard_allow_with_empty_resource_uris_is_rejected
  (defense-in-depth against the silent for-loop-iterates-zero-times
  scope-bypass)
- non_wildcard_allow_accepts_matching_uri
- non_wildcard_allow_rejects_non_matching_uri_and_names_it
  (ResourceNotAllowed must name the failing URI exactly)
- glob_star_pattern_matches_path_segment ('*' wildcard semantics)
- one_failing_uri_in_a_batch_rejects_the_whole_invocation
  (per-URI all-must-pass — no best-effort allow-some mode)
- deny_pattern_overrides_allow_pattern (deny wins on collision)
- deny_only_with_no_allow_passes_unmatched_uris

All 10 pass locally in <0.01s via cargo test -p fcp-conformance --test
capability_resource_constraint_conformance.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
